overview: CementHub Tools is a professional cement plant engineering calculator website featuring 5 specialized tools for heat balance, mill efficiency, kiln throughput, alternative fuel substitution, and energy consumption analysis. All calculations run client-side in real time with benchmark comparisons.
features: Heat Balance Calculator with thermal efficiency and heat loss analysis
Mill Efficiency Calculator with separator efficiency and Bond Work Index
Kiln Throughput Estimator with volumetric and thermal loading
AFR Substitution Rate Calculator for alternative fuel analysis and CO2 reduction
Energy Consumption Analyzer with OEE and energy intensity benchmarking
Industrial design with color-coded Good/Average/Poor performance indicators
